ap5_gate_resolution.notes: Iteration 1 pins the runtime-visible source surface.
Source artifacts and reports are digest-pinned.
Current source state is recorded and stale variants fail closed.
Support margin, threshold, retention, and error are present.
Memory context is explicit through route_b memory delta.
Regulation context is explicit through bounded response and recovery score.
Descriptor remains support/identity-condition context only.
Declared fixtures are excluded from the endogenous source surface.
The frozen control matrix includes external target rejection.
The frozen control matrix includes hidden derivation rejection.
Hidden target derivation is blocked with the frozen blocker.
The frozen derivation policy is present and used by I3/I6.
The target is generated before bridge ranking.
The target surface is explicit.
A numeric target center is emitted.
The target band is emitted and ordered.
A numeric target tolerance is emitted.
The frozen bounded drift policy is present and exercised.
Clamp policy exists and unbounded drift variants fail closed.
Budget cost surface is recorded before target use.
Frozen budget units are present.
Budget validity is checked before target use and invalid budgets fail closed.
Dependency trace covers target fields and omissions are blocked.
Idempotency scopes are recorded and reproducible for control and replay matrices.
The target affects ranking while semantic goal ownership remains blocked.
Artifact-only replay rebuilds the runtime vector and target.
Snapshot/load replay reproduces the target.
Order inversion replay preserves target equality.
Post-hoc proxy formation is blocked.
All twelve frozen controls are present and fail closed.
I5/I6 output-shape compatibility checks are present.
All unsafe claim flags remain false.
No src changes are present.
Native support remains unopened.
Phase 8 remains closed.
Fully native integration remains unopened.

closeout_result.final_scope: runtime-derived target/proxy condition generated from source-current support, memory, regulation, and AP4 consequence context; control-clean, bounded-drift clean, and replay-clean at artifact level

hypothesis_a_runtime_state_proxy_sources.boundary: runtime-visible source state remains artifact state, not semantic ownership, agency, identity acceptance, or native support
hypothesis_a_runtime_state_proxy_sources.resolution: source-backed runtime-visible support, memory, regulation, and support/identity-condition source surface for proxy formation

hypothesis_b_bounded_endogenous_proxy_fo.boundary: bounded endogenous proxy formation is artifact-level AP5, not semantic goal ownership, intention, agency, or native support
hypothesis_b_bounded_endogenous_proxy_fo.resolution: deterministic source-current target generation with bridge consumption, external-proxy contrast, fail-closed controls, bounded drift, and replay

hypothesis_c_goal_ownership_and_agency_b.boundary: AP5 target formation does not open goal ownership, intention, semantic choice, agency, identity acceptance, native support, fully native integration, or unrestricted agency
hypothesis_c_goal_ownership_and_agency_b.resolution: unsafe claim promotions remain blocked by claim flags, I4 blocked-claim records, and I5 dedicated relabel controls

roadmap_update_decision.reason: N15 is closed and the recommended roadmap continuation is N16.

whole_experiment_interpretation.claim_boundary_summary: The AP5 result supports only artifact-level endogenous proxy formation. It does not license semantic goal ownership, intention, semantic choice, agency, identity acceptance, native support, fully native integration, or unrestricted agency.
whole_experiment_interpretation.handoff_rule: N16 may consume N15 only as artifact-level AP5 endogenous proxy formation evidence; it must not consume N15 as semantic goal ownership, identity acceptance, agency, native support, or fully native integration evidence.
whole_experiment_interpretation.plain_language_interpretation: N15 closes with artifact-level AP5 endogenous proxy formation. The target condition is generated before use from source-current support, memory, regulation, and AP4 consequence context. It is distinguishable from external fixtures and hidden or post-hoc derivations, all frozen controls fail closed, and bounded drift plus replay hold.
supporting_evidence_summary: N15 pins direct AP2 target evidence but does not promote it to AP5
old-best N13 AP3 + N14 AP4 + N08/N09/N12 context generates the target before use
bridge probe consumes the generated target during bounded regulation ranking
external fixture, injected target, hidden derivation, and post-hoc proxy explanations are blocked
twelve adversarial controls fail closed with distinct blockers
support, memory, regulation, and AP4 consequence perturbations remain within bounded drift
duplicate, artifact-only filesystem, snapshot/load, and order-inversion replay are stable
all 36 AP5 gates validate and all unsafe claim promotions remain blocked
whole_experiment_interpretation.why_it_matters_for_roadmap: N15 gives N16 a claim-clean endogenous target/proxy formation substrate for testing self/environment boundary separation.
